title: Portable Portals
description: This mod introduces special portable items, the Portable Nether Portal and Portable End Portal, allowing you to create Nether and End portals anywhere.
body:
# **Use the new items to create portals anywhere in the world!**

# Recipe:

## Portable Nether Portal
![Nothing | Obsidian | Nothing - Obsidian | Blaze Powder | Obsidian - Nothing | Obsidian| Nothing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/effece6629e9552e66a683aaea6b02378f4c08d0.png)

## Portable End Portal
![Ender Eye | Obsidian | Ender Eye - Diamond Block | Nether Star | Diamond Block - Ender Eye | Obsidian | Ender Eye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb8d23fbb64a4941663a43cc90dc98cfafadb6a8.png)

# Tutorial:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_xoG6KQGHlc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Limitations:

## Portable Nether Portal:
Overworld: works.
Nether: works.
End: doesn't work.

## Portable End Portal:
Overworld: works.
Nether: doesn't work.
End: doesn't work.
